metadata.rationale: The article's main idea is grounded in real WrestleMania-week activity and authentic fan/creator posts, but it somewhat overstates how unified and coherent that ecosystem was. It also uses related but not identical visuals in a way that can make readers treat magazine/editorial and fan-made content as if they were direct evidence of the immediate WrestleMania event environment.
